title: Community Mental Health Agencies * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Community Mental Health Agencies * Native American Community 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers comprehensive behavioral health services, including mental health evaluations and treatment, counseling, substance use disorder treatment, medication management, peer support specialists, transportation coordination, and help connecting with community resources. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Native Americans and Tribal services employees (and family members on health insurance plan) Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm, Thursday 9:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 879-2026 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH TRIBES HEALTH SATELLITE CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to services including but not limited to mental health assessments, counseling services, emotional/life skills coaching, and trauma recovery/trauma informed care. Also provides resources related to substance abuse such as assessment, counseling, anger management classes, relapse prevention, and aftercare. 6000 New Way Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Phone Line: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Lobby: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (541) 884-1841 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GRAND RONDE HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES KLAMATH TRIBES BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CLINIC YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
